product.title: Vita Liberata Body Blur, Leg and Body Makeup. Skin Perfecting Body Foundation for Flawless Bronze, Easy Application, Radiant Glow, Evens Skin Tone, New Packaging
featureBullets: Description - Body Blur is a widely-loved product by makeup artists everywhere. It's the best-selling body makeup and skin finish that delivers a flawless, glowing look with its light-reflecting formula.
Benefits - Nourishing ingredients like Organic Glycerin for moisture and hydration, and Shea Butter to soften and smooth skin
Suggested Use - Ensure skin is clean and free of moisturizer. Apply to a tanning mitt and blend in circular motions. Use sparingly on décolleté, hands, or feet.

specification.value: Nourishing ingredients like Organic Glycerin for moisture and hydration, and Shea Butter to soften and smooth skin
#7,583 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #60 in Body Self-Tanners
Alcohol Free, Paraben Free, Phthalate Free

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the self-tanner effective, with legs looking tanned and flawless all day, and appreciate its natural-looking glow with a tiny bit of shimmer. Moreover, the product receives positive feedback for its color, with one customer noting it's not orange at all. However, there are mixed experiences with transferability - while some say it doesn't get on clothes, others report it transfers easily. Additionally, coverage and streak-free application receive mixed reviews, with some saying it hides imperfections well while others find it doesn't cover enough. The drying time is also mixed, with some noting it dries quickly while others say it washes away easily.

reviews.reviewText: I was so impressed with body make up! I applied it from a few inches above my knees and down my lower legs and it really did lightly blur any veins imperfections- similar to a light suntan. It had only a very faint scent and dried quickly leaving a faint lotion-like finish. (Be sure to wash your hands thoroughly when finished applying.) I only saw some transfer on a few places at the hem of my dress and not everywhere so I am thinking maybe I had applied a little extra at those spots. I forgot about it at night and didn’t wash it off and it did not get on the inside of my pjs. Not sure about arms and if that would transfer but if and when I decide to try it there I will edit this review.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 22, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Goes on smoothly and evenly. It leaves just a hint of a "glow" which I like. Makes your skin look smooth but not overly shiny. It evens out your skin tone, wears very well. Didnt dry my skin out either. I wore a white knit sweater vest and golf shorts. When I bent over I realized my white sweater was rubbing against my thighs. I was like "uh-oh" But, it didn't rub off! I love this and would buy it again.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Pretty good , but it does transfer to clothing even if you set it with a setting spray . But in fairness , I haven’t found any that haven’t transferred at all . Pretty color
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on September 9, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This Vita Liberata body makeup tanning lotion is amazing! It’s so easy to apply, dries instantly, and gives my skin a beautiful, natural-looking glow. A little goes a long way, so you don’t need much to get even, streak-free coverage. It blends effortlessly and feels lightweight, without any sticky residue. The long-lasting formula stays put but washes off easily when needed. If you’re looking for a quick, flawless tan without the commitment, I highly recommend this body makeup! Used on my legs!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 3, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This has got to be the absolute WORST product I’ve ever used in my life!! I’d give it zero if I could. The statement this company makes about their product being ‘zero transfer’ is 100% false. I put this on early morning. Did not get dressed for almost an hour! My clothes were covered and my bedding….is probably ruined. Oh and to top it all off, it doesn’t wash out! DO NOT BUY!! Photos are my sheets this morning, 16 hrs after application!!! The cami is after a wash on hot!! Disgusted. Hoping to return as a ‘defective’ product!!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 27, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I have rather fair skin, and this gives me just a hint of color. It looks very natural, really easy to apply and blend. It doesn’t seem to transfer on clothing. I will update the review after I wear white clothing. Really happy with it and impressed. I may get bold and try the next darker shade. Since it it light, it doesn’t cover the spider veins a lot. Probably the darker shade would do a better job at it. It covers a little, and mixing some concealer with it helps.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on May 16, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: Great color, easy to use, transfers onto sheets and furniture.
reviews.reviewText: I’m torn on this one, which is why I gave it three stars. It is my first time using body make up instead of a self tanner. I am very fair skin with reddish undertones. Irish, through and through. 57 years old, so older skin. I love the color! It goes on very easy and it is just enough to give some coverage that is even, hydrating and a little shimmer. The only drawback is that it comes off. I have light sheets and even though I leave it on until it’s totally dry and maybe I’ve been out for the day or the evening, the next day it is all over my sheets. Still looks good on my skin, but the color definitely transferred. Just keep this in mind and in case you are at somebody’s house and sitting on light furniture, or your own. I will still use it for certain things, but will go back to self tanner instead.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on June 15, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This is hands down THE BEST product I've purchased in a long time. I'm fair skinned and I've tried many self tanners that claim "won't make you orange". And yet, I always turn orange. So I was searching for another alternative since I was attending an evening winter time wedding. I found this and it was everything I wanted. It goes on just like lotion, dries quickly, doesn't transfer and didn't make me orange at all. Just a great tan look but not too dark either. It washed off the next morning with just some body wash and puff. The bottle size is big so it'll last through many uses. I even used it on my face underneath my other makeup. The picture shows me next to my daughter. I'm normally paler than she is.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 18, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This stuff is excellent, instant even tan, no streaks, natural colours, I'm fair skinned, got both the light and the dark and went sparingly, it's amazing stuff. Stains hands, use washing up liquid and scrubby kitchen pad to remove.... Or a tan mitt. Great stuff.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on December 23, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Colour suits my skin. Not patchy. Easy application. Will buy again.
It makes the skin shine and gives a nicer tone, however, it runs off with the sweat and stains clothes. Should not use it in a hot environment, no skin contact 🙈
